summary: Add drift command that compares the latest rates_snapshots row per (base, target) against the oldest snapshot in a --since window and reports the largest absolute percent movers.
reason: Joins two rows of rates_snapshots that no API endpoint can produce. Requires local history nobody else stores.
validated_outcome: Verified via synthetic 25h-old snapshot injection: drift --base USD --since 26h correctly identified JPY +5.0%, GBP -2.91%, EUR -2.89% movers.
